title: actinomeris squarrosa var. alternifolia
intro: Actinomeris squarrosa var. alternifolia, also known as the Coast Range Actinomeris, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Actinomeris squarrosa var. alternifolia include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Actinomeris squarrosa var. alternifolia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
